star_1.text: l do love to play this games , but now this becomes not a games, this is all ads. every rounds the games have to watch ads, and forcing to watch ads. each round ads have 2 ads. I try to play games for 20mins been watching over 30 ads

Absolutely terrible. Optional ads are 60+ seconds long and after each level there are mandatory 15-45 second long ads. This kind of practice is unacceptable. On top of that, the game I've very stingy with resources and the overall gameplay gets repetitive fast. Honestly, even if the game was 10/10 I would still recommend you stay away from it just because of how bad the ads are.

Whether you're online and you backed up your data every 24hrs or offline and just proceed with playing, the game sometimes never saves your previous progress. Even you close the game properly, it resets your game from previous session you had. Additional to the problem is even you have a gigabyte of online data, the ad rewards don't work, risking a reset of currrent progress from previous progress. This has happened a dozen times already, plus the spawning of power-up chest when the boss is down

The game may be fun and exciting but it bothers me that you force the player to watch ads. It is annoying, kills all the mood to play. If you want ads in the game add it like many others of several different genres, behind some reward, not in front of your face after you finish a level. Uninstalled

Used to be a very good game until the latest update. Now the game thrive on ads! The Menu are harder to navigate thru, cant log out game unless you close them thru multiple window view, the daily prize that used to be free can only be obtain by using 5 gems, nothing are free now unless you used real life money to make purchase, and just so many things that make this game less appealing. Spirit Bomb ruined the game single handedly. Everything that used to make this game great are a non existence.

I don't know who made this stupid decision to weaken pets... Now they're actually useless most of the time of playing... Powerful zombiegon became one weak not necessary pet now... It's not an upgrade of the game, it's downgrade... And I don't think players will pay real money just to make your game easier and more fun because it's not and will not be fun anymore... Wish I could give 0 stars...

Getting wings is a very very long wait. Can u make it like 5 or 3 minutes? That would be a whole lot better cuz the wing consumption is like 6 and the wings capacity is only 24. And when that runs out I need to wait a whole hour to play. And also, some of the features you mentioned are not in the game. Like the crafting of weapons and etc..

Originally I thought it was a great app, I was right. Then, well ... ads are good source of income for this app, sure - understandable. But they use this dirty strat to automatically click on the ad like I intentionally click on it, no ... I didnt click on the ad ... Devs design the bug to get more affiliated commision and that cause the Sky Champ app to reset itself, it lost rewards that I should have after finishing my flight, e.g: spent 3 wings, got 1.2k gold and 1 level up Pettomon - erased!

Unfortunately you ruined the game with the last updates, it wasn't really an update actually, you haven't changed anything to be better, you only forced users to watch an add to get anything that used to be given for free before. insted of bypassing game issues like when you buy an item in the shop you can't see any information about it and what does it offer!!! so sad i must uninstall this great game ! :(

It was fun at first, but for 4 months straight, there were no league rewards. I contacted customer service multiple times and they blamed my internet even after sending them evidence of the issue. Many people had the same issue as well, and due to the poor customer service, I cant say many positive things about this game. People asked so many times about League rewards and there was never a response from this company.

The game says it can't give me any rewards until I update it. However, there is no option to do so. When I go on to the app store it only says "open" or "uninstall" I'm very tempted to do the latter as I've spent too much time on this game with all the annoying ads, only for it to not give what it promises. Fix it!

I haven't been able to load or restore my save data for nearly a week. I've emailed the devs twice with no response. It's an adorable game. Sucks that it stopped working the day after I decided to buy the battle pass.

Please fix this bug. When I want to buy something or collect my reward from "Piggy bank event", a pop-up message says "unable to connect to app store". The problem is that I use a Samsung phone which doesn't have "app store" that runs by apple phones. I mean that my phone works with android system that doesn't have "app store" app unlike IOS system that has that app. So, please help fixing this bug, please.

What happen with the league system? I can't get the prize from it. And it seems every player that used to be around in the rank is also missing. Already try unsinstall but it still doesn't work. I even try to make a new account but the problem remains. Please fix this, and I will change my rating to 5. Thx

Bought the Battle Pass at the start of last month when it started. Was going well and then on 30 Aug, new battle pass appear. It was ok to me even though there are 31 days in Aug. What i was surprised is that the uncollected reward were not in my inbox! Its been 2 days but still i do not see my rewards! I completed to level 30 and now everything gone! Can u pls reach out to me to solve this? I spent quite abit to buy pass n ingame items..

I used to played this game before and it so sad that it isn't used to. I noticed that once you killed monsters and the coins disappeared when it flew out of the phone screen😢😢. And also sa shooting couldn't change even if you upgrade the okimon.

Game was running perfectly fine until I purchased a battle pass. Now it stays frozen on the Skychamp loading screen permanently, if it ever does unfreeze I'll never purchase anything through this game again. If it doesn't unfreeze will have to uninstall and lose a LOT of hours gameplay, and I will not reinstall it again.

Would be a fun time killer but anytime there's an ad ( shop,lucky spin, after match, continue, or ad drop in mission) it doesnt show an ad it just force closes and reopens to starting screen really frustating when trying to play as i cant continue a match or enjoy the game

Latest update pretty much ruined the game. I guess not enough money was made of it that they had to make a huge push to make it a must to spend or you wont get anywhere. sucks honestly. I was spending about 20 bucks a week or so simply because it was fun but now i am happy to uninstall and go find something better to play.

Can u please fix pet rescue by watching ads when failed not purchase? The rescue mode is to find a path to get a pet but awfully if I failed and wanted to continue, I have to buy to continue?!?! Spirit Bomb, please fix it right now. So awful

star_2.text: I don't enjoy watching ads but I do because I love the game and felt it was worth the inconvenience to recieve the rewards. But now that's false advertisement. The ad stops and shuts the game down just a few seconds before reward and when you log back on no reward. I love the game and the creativity but if you can't honor the reward after watching annoying ads, why would I want to pay, risk my Private info and get nothing, and no response like it has been, and no reward.

UPDATE: The decision to put a banner ad right where the back button is in pettamon menu was a bad choice. -2 stars! In a sea of shooter clones the fact that this game gives a wide variety of monsters (both main and wingmen) to choose from is great. The fact that the ships and wingmen you use are monster themed also gives points toward originality. The only thing I would deduct points for is the monetization. Less ads would be great, but I realize in games like this it's going to happen.

There's no option for me to equip magnet to collect coins with ease. Coins drop way too fast to collect, & there's very little of it. The plane doesn't slow down when you remove your finger. It also doesn't go to where your finger is on the screen. Products are way too expensive, & the daily quest is almost none existences. There are plenty of similar games with cheaper products on sale nowadays. Funny thing is, I actually enjoy playing this game. Unfortunately it's lacking alot of things.

Chapter 2 onwards players need to spend at least 2 stamina to play each stage, what a bummer... Clearly this game quietly forces players to pay for ingame items and the ads are overwhelming for free items. 30 seconds for each freebie. Another bummer in my list. The most stars I am willing to give is 2 stars max. Oh well, most of the mobile games are here to grab our cash. Greedy surpasses passion!

Too big of a pay wall. The game play is OK but is made incredibly repetitive by the tediously slow progression. For a game that thrives on collecting and evolving, the process for both is horrendously slow unless you're willing to pay. Great premise, OK game play, terrible monetization approach.

The actual game itself is pretty good. There are some issues though that need resolved. The game will randomly pause on me for no reason. It will also try to randomly minimize the game. Worse part for me is all the forced ads they throw at you. Sure they have a pay option for that but dont force the player to pay real money for it that's just greedy and a bad business practice.

It's fun but the ads are irritating and you have no control over whether you see them or not. I'm also not sure if it's just me but I have to play the stupid intro fight everytime I open the game. All of my progress is saved but I shouldnt have to go through that everytime I want to play. I dont think I would mind it if I could skip it or if the fight wasnt that long but having to play it annoying.

Just add a feature to level up a certain number of pettomon while I'm not playing. Progress in this game is ridiculously slow and repetitive. Kinda feels hopeless trying to use anything other than a main squad or gold generating mons and it barely covers the gold cost of any relevant activity either way. You repeat the one same mode over and over to improve and even the story and trial challenges are just shorter stretches of the endless mode with hardly any variation. Could be a cool game.

There are still 22 pettomons I haven't got. I have played everyday for months yet not even one of them I get from the eggs. Not even the premium eggs or the magical one! Some of them never even show up in the shop. How am I supposed to do to get them? The odds in every single gambling-based feature in this game is awful. Including equipment upgrade. Once I had 80%+ success chance yet I failed twice. In a row! How's that possible? You got to fix this. This is getting boring...

At first it was ok, but now I find it a waste of time and "FURSTRATING" since all upgrades have less than 50% chance of success, which needless say they don't and you lose the coins and gems. It's hard to upgrade when they don't let you upgrade. I am going to uninstall the app and find one that more fair.

Good game actually, except for: 1. Okimon leveling up system which is such a waste. so many resources needed for leveling up but every time playing the game, my max leveled okimon always start from the bottom again (small bullet not like the picture with big awesome bullet) 2. Instead of getting Bullet, Gamers often get S (super) or star (double score) for drop item at the beginning of the game which actually useless because all the monster still weak and not aggressive.

This is a cool little game, but I am giving it only 2 stars.. The problem is that some of the ads are too long & often causes the game to freeze for a very long time.. What is suppose to be a 30 second ad, ends up taking more then 5 minutes to complete..

Only 1 star now as I can c this is one of those games where the developers are just on the make. They know the game crashes constantly costing you all your rewards, experience and effort. Don't worry about fixing anymore as I have removed this potentially great game from my device. Good bye!

I really like this game, I do. I played it for years, but a month ago I changed my device and somehow I can't restore the back up. Other games can be restored just fine, only skychamp can't be restored. I emailed the developer 5 days ago and up until now I didn't get the reply yet. I have to change the rating just to get your attention here.

Was a good game, played for a year now but recently the eggs I get mid game don't show up on my homescreen. Been egg less for a week now and Uninstalled the game twice hoping it'll fix it but nothing worked. Sucks cause that's about the only way you can upgrade your pekkom without buying shards. Really hope this gets fixed soon!!

Down more stars .. I am running out of patience with the stupid ads I have to watch fot the pitiful rewards but at least make the videos actually play.. have wasted hours trying to get the reward video to play properly ... I have loved this game for months now even though you decided to make everything that was free and easily available, to now having to watch ads ect..so at least fix the issues please...

Ihave been asking for a while now for you guys to please fix the bug where it won't let me ac Scroll up to see all my pets so i can level up, not will it let me scroll up on equipment so i can level up. Also still have to watch adds after purchasing diamond packs.

I'm knocking three stars off, down to two stars from five stars. Buying gems only removes the ads from gift powerups instead of all ads as the game says. That's very misleading and it's so useless since it's not often that you get gift powerups. A waste of money to support the devs.
sometimes when exiting the game and rebooting the rewards and experience earned prior to closing the game is lost. Please help fix this bug/error. Otherwise the game is fun and challenging.

After taking a break playing I noticed some changes and I found that the creators of Skychamp has gotten greedy you used to get free spins and free little gremlins to help you upgrade and there was a mode that you didn't have to play in the league anyway not as fun as it used to be for me so I'm moving on

star_3.text: I really like it. I like that you can pick different characters and they get different ammo to fight with. I wish there was a coin magnet so I dont have to chase the coins all over the screen.

this game is very nice including the graphics, upgrades.... now some functions doesn't seem to work like ship speed..... the all group system absolutely not working. I reached level 9 and had 12 star's, to penetrate next level didn't qualify lack of upgrades equipments (gold) and slowly moving when attacking. they needed 20 star's to qualify to the next level, so it was very difficult for me to go through.

Had to lower my review rating cause the moment you get to level 9 the game requires you get perfect scores on all 5 advanced levels to unlock level 10. First off, I play these games to win, not to constantly lose and watch ads so you can make money. Second, what's the point of acquiring all those neat extras along the way if they don't help you in battle? Third, I still never received the 50 diamonds for logging in. I think I might just uninstall.

love this game but would be nice if there were some instructions. When playing see things get dropped by monsters but have no idea what they are for or do. Took me a bit to figure out that "revive" doesn't mean watch to revive and that buying items before combat means buy extra experience or power up. still fun to play. update: game updated, no more free stuff and more ads to watch. not to mention the game says ads would be removed if you bought something. I did but still have to watch ads.

I remember when skychamp used to be a great game. Early days didn't lock all your free gifts behind video ads. I also remember that there used to be some fun alternate game modes and challenge runs, like being able to play top player's teams and no shooting just surviving challenges. Shame they don't seem to be in the game anymore. 3 stars for the good memories, 2 stars otherwise.

Before the last update, I was really enjoying the game so much, I even recommend my friends to play the game. But what happen now is really suck, when I playing battle killing the monsters, the screen freeze and lag. Oh... no.... please fix it. Some battle pass mission are not functioning, recently totally couldn't get any new pettomons. I'm VIP 5, I really do not hope to delete / uninstall the game now. Please do something, please fix the game....

I was really into this game but new update shows the direction the game is going. All the daily free stuff are now replaced with ad-watching and have also become lessened. I didnt spend much money on this game and that was the beauty of it but i guess the devs werent hally about that. Too bad , really. They just chose a bad direction to take yhe game , I read new gacha , new rewards from ads and i was excited but in the end it just got much much worse whereas it was so good

I LOVE this game! it is always my go to game. I have a significant amount of followers in the game industry and I can not recommend this game.. Instructions on game play is just not there. I have been playing for over a month and still can not understand how to play.. The only reason I am still playing is because it makes me giggle out loud.. Panda throwing chop sticks. bums releasing gas..lol if you want to just play it is a great game. if you are competitive like I am, not a good game....

Decent game, but league play gets more difficult without getting worth more points, and missions won't register purchasing equipment with coins, forcing you to spend gems to complete missions. Will also do things like have a flying chest appear after the boss is defeated and then say you didn't eliminate all enemies.

I fell in love with Sky Champ the first 5 minutes of playing it. The gameplay is easy to understand and hard to master as each Okimon and Pettomon are mostly unique and some pair up much better than others. I bought the new battle pass in August and when it expired I bought it again in September and reached the 1st perk but now it's reset and telling me I need to buy it again. I just bought it 2 days ago. Can you please fix this? I won't be spending anymore money until it's resolved.

Good time killer game! Great graphic! Im having a trouble watching ads for freebies or revive. It often stuck and if I closed the game and return, the time is rolled back!!!! Not good! This happen on my both samsung devices. Please help.

A lot of feature mentioned above were not included. Like the sheep looking sky beast, crafting weapons and stuff. Also the adventure mode is nothing like in the picture. Though the game was okay and I enjoyed it. I would enjoy it more if those features I mentioned are included.

When I spend days getting 100 star things to start picking a random reward I chose one and I got a lightmon. But there was only 2 lightmon and then it changed the funki to a lightmon and there was on hour left before the rewards reset so devs please fix this bug but overall controls and color are good it's just I missed out on a five star I was supposed to get

Although this game has entertained me i uninstalled it because of ridiculous and annoying number of adds that pop up after every second mission. Perhaps the game is good. I'm not willing to wait unnecessary for 30 seconds after 2 missions.

Would've given 5 stars, if not for the long dragging stage later on. Running for 3 consecutive rounds just to finish one level is quite a tedious job. Would rather have a tougher enemies than repeating the game for multiple rounds.

Can you make it automatic collect gold? If not please wider the range. It's hard to collect gold, the required gold to upgrade and to merge pettomons is thousands but every time you collect in battle is only hundreds. And please, i notice that every Okimon has its own difficulties, diffulties in enemy and also in gold. Please be fair. Thats only thing i want to request from you. I would rather suggest also to do some daily gift. That's all,thank you. I hope you will read this and also to apply.

The game itself is good, but every time the egg is hatched it will always be almost the same as you previously hatched egg. I already maxed out my okimon and it still shoots level 1 bullet, the bullet will only change if you get a power up mid game. Please change these developer. I'm looking forward on this changes on the next update

Game is fun. Only thing is that I still get ads even though it says make any purchase and their will be no ads. So I bought and the difference in before and after purchase is practically the same. Wasted money

I said i would replace all stars to my beloved game when internet bug was fixed. Then it was fixed for a minute, but still says i have to be connected to the iternet when i am connected to it all along. I dont know what to say, nust love the gAme but dont get rewards promised for reasons that are fabricated. My internet IS connected 😠 So it stays up enough for me to upgrade my review then says im not connected again LOL. Love the game, hate the headache.

another game that seems decent; killed for me because of an annoying turorial that completely railroads your choices, and won't even let you adjust settings (such as not having music and sounds both on and at max volume).

star_4.text: Overall, it's a good shooter with good controls. Colorful graphics and smooth gameplay. I personally don't care for the egg hatching, but it's a unique addition to the game. Would like to see a couple changes in the future. 1st, the ability to start from 0 instead of current position in league mode. 2nd, an option to purchase ad removal (banner and forced). Bottom line it's an enjoyable game that's worth checking out.

I love this game, although the past couple of days for league play, I haven't accrued the trophy prize. I've been stuck on 3,272 trophies when I should be closer to 3,600. Not sure what the issue is but can someone assist with this? Everything else is solid and enjoyable. Good graphics, variety, easy to upgrade, and ads don't run rampant.
Great game ads are not that long or bad only if you want something. Not to hard but I just started so I know it will get harder.Try it.

I have been playing this game for a couple years I have spent a lot of real money in this game. But I had to recently switch phones now I can't get past the loading screen because of some add at th3 bottom. I have sent an email and no reply PLEASE HELP ME can you get me past the loafing screen please I love the game otherwise

The game is awesome. The concept of rearing monsters and getting gifts is quite impressive. But in the updated version, the scope of getting more gold coins is lessened. Also, the chance of getting free diamonds and coins on a regular basis is null which was available in the previous version. Again, if various monsters hatch from eggs time to time instead of the same monsters which I already have, monster collection would be enjoyable. Finally, special gifts should be given in every league game.
If Pokémon and space shooters had a kid... And some of the creatures in this game even remind me of certain Pokémon... Still like the game anyway

I love this game, indeed. It was amazing. But there are things that you can improve. We should be able to sell eggs which we dont like and be able to see what kind of egg we got from the league battle. Then, it will be better if we can fight other players. And lastly, there should be more choices os otomom and be able to buy directly pettomon rather than to refresh and refresh wishing for our desired pottomon to show up. Overall, it was great!

I decided to revisit this game after a crash wiped out my progress. While I'm still upset about that, the game itself is as fun as ever. It's a competent shooter with solid controls and an addictive character collecting mechanic. While it can feel a little grindy at times, I love the variety it offers when building your team.

The games concept is very good. Only downfall is the lack of content. Myself like many other have been seeking for this genre of game but with no pay to win aspect, my advice as a solid gamer is to avoid the pay to win and consider adding new stuff fast which is achievable through playing and grinding. Been playing for a week and already im getting to that nearly bored of it stage. Your game has potential to be great.

Heavy use of timers/energy/rare currency, which is standard for mobile games these days. There is actual gameplay though, as opposed to "games" whose actual focus is on the gambling/upgrading of things. The gameplay is fun and diverse. The progression/scaling is a bit weird though since e.g. attack values scale linearly while the cost goes up exponentially. It's also impossible to tell what to invest in, everything requires lots of gold/shards to become relevant. Still worth playing.

I honestly never thought I would find a Pokemon/Digimon-inspired Galaga game, yet here we are. Definitely a unique concept from what I've seen, and having an entire roster of adorable and uniquely designed creatures IMMEDIATELY puts this game far above other Pokemon-inspired games which just steal official designs. One tiny nitpick though, I can't find the index for all of the creatures, though since it's a small roster and you can scroll through in the powerup menu so it works for now

Hello, Really enjoying this game. But something weird happened since your last update Devs. I read from someone else's comment and I am submitting the kind of same issue. While playing the screen freezes instantly and can't play smoothly. Happens constantly when one of the pettemons kills an enemy. Saying again, this issue happened to me since your last update. So far game was playing smoothly.. Hope you fix it soon...

The game is good for killing time, but there's a bug where leveling up doesn't seem to change anything. The gameplay feels repetitive, and the bullets don’t upgrade visually like in earlier versions, which is disappointing. I hope the developers fix this and add new events.

Hi i would like it if there was a endless co op that you could play with friends or even an online feature to play with other people across the world. I think it will make the game more fun and it will get people to tell friends to get your game to play together so please take this feature into consideration thanks.

I wish I could rate this as 4.5/5 stars... The only two main things wrong with this amazingly fun and horribly addicting game are the Okimons inability to 100% match finger/thumb/stylus/etc sensitivity, and the lack of a UI locking-type system to keep from both bringing up the home buttons when scrolling too low, and to stop the lack of movement when accidentally swiping too far down, up, or to the sides... Wish the game could pause itself in those situations... Otherwise, awesome and addicting.

Review update: Thank you for the response and for fixing what was needed to be fixed for the betterment of this game. I'm giving you guys 4 🌟 for now and I'll give you extra if no more problems arise. 👍🏾 1st Review: Video ads aren't working, losing/resetting rewards when exiting the game, gems are so hard to collect unless the video ads are working, no reason of collecting video item dropping frm the chest if the videos aren't working. Begin to lose interest in this game.

A good scroller game, gets you involved into it, but a little bit of grinding as well. One complaint that I have and I hope they fix is I wish the coins would automatically come to you. Powerups sure try to get them but the coins need to automatically come to you, they are not worth enough to go be chasing around. I would also like to see you can recover health.

this one of the offline games ive been playing for a while now. my only suggestion is that you make 24h eggs super rare but make the loot from it better. as of now there is actually no point in getting 24h eggs because all the pettomons i get from it so far are rubbish. also being able to save the progress of the game is good but it is being exploited to alter the stats and skills of equipment and skills. you should have made the stats fixed and put items of sort to be used for reroll instead.

I change my rate from 1star to 4star. They fixed the in game purchased bug. 4star only because i wanna see my exact damage to mobs/bosses, the crit and exp goal. If you do that i would change it to 5star real quick. Overall awesome graphics, smooth control, great story and nice mechanics. I hope you would consider my request and have a wonderful day.

It's great, and everything and I can't say anything that can describe the game it's great. But I found some bugs too, like it consumes a lot of power, and some of my progress returns back to the way it was when I started to play it. It's like playing again and again without progress.

star_5.text: Don't let the cuteness of the pet hatching in this game fool you, this is a serious bullet-hell shmup, and it's a damn good one. Also the devs are very generous with rewards, you can upgrade your monsters and progress through the tougher levels without spending a dime, but you will need skill, practice, and quick reflexes. My only complaint is that I didn't discover this game sooner. Very fun and challenging shmup game.

Hi! I'm a newbie in this game, The game so much fun! I very like it! But the one thing I want to suggest that you guys should fix the Okimon's shape of bullet, because every time I upgrade my Okimon, it doesn't change the shape (always in the max one). Another thing is that when I shoot the monsters die, they drop moneys right? But when it goes to the top of the screen IT DISAPPEARS. DAMN! I hope that the developers of this game will fix my problems as soon as possible. I'm very appreciated!

This game is so much fun. You collect main and 'helper' creatures and use them in battle to give them experience and level them up, and you can evolve them several times, each time making them more powerful and adding new abilities. The abilities can be leveled up as well. Choosing and discarding creatures based on combinations of random abilities they get makes the gameplay a lot deeper than it may seem on the surface. Very addictive.

Suggestion: Allow trading of Pettomons. For example, allow trading a Level 6 Pet for a Level 5 of your choice. Maybe add a gold and/or diamond cost to the transaction (but nothing crazy). Rationale: It's nearly impossible to skill up some Pets that start out at Level 4 and 5, cuz they rarely show up as random prizes and shards don't show up for them that often. Example: I've had a Genofire for months. Great Pet, use it quite often...but I've only ever been able to upgrade 1 skill, 1 time.

Fun little game that is (very) loosely based on the game Galaga. I used to love playing Galaga as a teen, so this brings back some bittersweet memories. I have been playing for a couple hours now with no sign of a pay wall... so far so good. If this changes I will come back and update as well as removing stars. Harder the pay wall, the more I will remove and would likely uninstall post review

This game in advertising comes across a little like an odd Pokemon clone with some arcade shooting mechanic. Turns out, it's more of an arcade shooter with some Pokemon clone mechanics (kind of). There are two types of creature with abilities that effect the shooter portion, which I would say is, conservatively, at least 90% of the game. THIS IS A GOOD THING (in my opinion). The game knows what it is and does it well. Give it a try, at least. You won't be disappointed.

EDIT: After one year playing, this game still rocks! I still have fun playing and collecting all the monsters. Thanks for the update! ORIGINAL REVIEW: OMG this game is so much better than all the other shooting games! Forget Everwing, Sky Force, DragonFlight for kakao, Chicken Shooter or Galaxy Space Shooter! Just download SkyChamp and you will never return to any of them. This is even better than my all time favorite Elemental Wing! Highly recommended <3

THIS GAME DOESN'T FORCE YOU TO WATCH ADS!!! This is the best thing about this game! You can watch ads to continue after dying or to get free items and game currency. I love how the characters (petmons and okimons) are cool and cute😍 The only concern is the balance of the items spawned. At each play(until die), some times 80% of the item are the same. It's not rare to end up with lots of double score item, only 1 or 2 powerups and NO skill items when you reach 4th stage at league...

Love this game but I would love to have the part back where you collect the letters in battle that was fun and exciting. Please bring it back. This game is fun I cannot purchase anything with real money at the time so getting diamonds and stuff takes a while and I get bored with it. I think it needs something extra to it and better prizes to make it more exciting. I love the special where you collect the letters to get rewards you should make it where it lasts the entire month not just 5 times.

I LOVE this game! This company also makes another app similar, I've deleted all other apps I had that were similar and only have these two in use now. so much fun to play, easily build up coins for purchasing extras. When you make any purchase, no matter how small, the adds go away permanently. I would recommend to anyone

Actually quite a lot of fun. Despite how many of this style of game exist on the play store... my love of the old Strikers arcade game being what I was looking for... this is the most entertaining version of that genre that I have found. It isn't P2W which is extremely rare in mobile games now, and it is not as cutsie as one would think at a glance.
those is the coolest gam I've downloaded if you ant playing it your missing out on cool action ther is decent levels of fun

Wow! This is the first time i play a SHMUP RPG. The Pettomons are cute with unique skills, the musics are cute. It's so easy getting everything in the game without spending real cash. And the league is a nice added feature to get more prizes. This is recommended for every SHMUP players.

Great graphics, smooth play, great variety, ads are quick and painless, ability to play continuosly with little interruption from ads or being unable to aqcuire in-game items needed for play. 6 stars! Definite thanks to the developers on this one! keep it up. Ads are pretty relevant and knowing that developers rely on ads, I've downloaded a few of the advertised apps because they were so relevant to my game interests that brought me to find Sky Champ. Big Mahalo and Aloha to this developer!

Love it!! I've played this game before, but my game got corrupted so now I have to start all over again, but still this is my favourite.

The skill button is still glitched. Defeating a boss with the skill button or approaching a boss with it on cool down will prevent it from completing refreshing unless you pick up another skill item. I noticed sometimes enemies attacks don't go away unless I use the skill to clear the screen. They stay lingering on the screen.

Some of the levels are quite difficult but I don't mind that but you should get more life because the players need it on the difficult levels make the characters stronger so you can kill the enemy a lot easier and you need to find characters quickly

Cute graphics, but don't let that fool you. The game play is as close to a bullet hell shooter as possible without being overwhelming. This game is good for veteran shooter fans like myself and the younger shooter fans as well.

Very fun, monetization is reasonable and unobtrusive. Very playable at $0 spent but drop 20 bucks or so and it's helpful without seeming like p2w. Interesting and cute pets. Needs better information on some of the pets abilities and mechanics.
